previous.description:
OctoNotes is a tool for generating release notes from Git repositories.
      Using the information generated by OctoNotes, we can calculate which release a fix landed in, across multiple release branches.
      We then use this to add a table to the related GitHub issue.

current.description:
OctoNotes is a tool for generating release notes from Git repositories.
      Using the information generated by OctoNotes, we can calculate which release a fix landed in, across multiple release branches.
      We then use this to add a table to the related GitHub issue.
